scores.justification: The report explicitly names at least two specific anomalies by id: pipe-07 partial failure with collateral refunds o088/o091, and t019 escalation tied to flagged orders o102/o107/o115 for Sarah Chen (u042).

The report is well-structured with clear per-resource sections (New Users, New Orders, Ticket Volume & Escalations, Pipeline Runs & Outcomes, Anomalies Summary) rather than stream-of-consciousness, with tables and organized subsections.
